ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity, CO2) */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model number of each sensor */,
  "sensor_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of each sensor */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last maintained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., hallway, office) */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Brief description of each location */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building where the location is situated */,
  "floor_number" INTEGER /* Floor number of each location */,
  "room_number" INTEGER /* Number of the room where the location is situated */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., office, hallway, meeting room) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the reading */,
  "reading_date" TEXT /* Date and time the reading was taken */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity reading in percentage */,
  "light" REAL /* Light reading in lux */,
  "co2" REAL /* CO2 reading in ppm */,
  "humidity_ratio" REAL /* Humidity ratio reading */,
  "occupancy" INTEGER /* Occupancy status (0 or 1) */,
  "reading_status" TEXT /* Status of each reading (e.g., valid, invalid, missing) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reading was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reading was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was maintained */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance event (e.g., calibration, replacement) */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., calibration, replacement, repair) */,
  "maintained_by" TEXT /* User who performed the maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_events_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department each user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of each user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of each role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that has the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of each permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the sensor data */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the sensor data (e.g., web interface, API, mobile app) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event occurred */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
